title: 20 stocks in the S&P 500 of companies with soaring sales and improving profit margins
summary: Earnings season standouts include AI hardware manufacturers alongside unexpected winners, with 20 S&P 500 stocks showing strong sales growth and expanding profit margins.
content: This earnings season’s big winners include makers of AI-oriented hardware, but the list also includes some surprises.

zh.title: 标普500指数中销售额飙升且利润率不断改善的20支股票
zh.summary: 财报季的佼佼者包括人工智能硬件制造商和一些意想不到的赢家，其中20支标普500指数股票显示出强劲的销售增长和利润率扩张。

title: Cerebras prices IPO above expected range, as Wall Street braces for AI tsunami
summary: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO priced above the expected range, signaling investor appetite for AI infrastructure as Wall Street prepares for larger AI deals later this year.
content: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO, and with the chipmaker's offering, investors are gearing up for some even bigger AI deals later this year.

zh.title: Cerebras首次公开募股定价高于预期范围，华尔街为人工智能海啸做准备
zh.summary: Cerebras在其首次公开募股中筹集了55.5亿美元，定价高于预期范围，表明投资者对人工智能基础设施的需求，华尔街为今年晚些时候的更大人工智能交易做准备。

title: In photos: Trump lands in China ahead of high-stakes summit with Xi
summary: Trump lands in China for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping covering contested issues including trade, technology, Taiwan, and the Iran conflict.
content: The high-stakes summit is expected to cover a wide range of contentious topics, including trade, technology, export controls, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

zh.title: 图片：特朗普抵达中国，为与习近平举行高风险峰会做准备
zh.summary: 特朗普抵达中国与习近平举行高风险峰会，涉及贸易、技术、台湾和伊朗冲突等争议问题。

title: Asia-Pacific stocks trade mixed as Trump lands in Beijing for high-stakes Xi meeting
summary: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed as Trump arrived in Beijing for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, tariffs, and technology restrictions.
content: Asia markets traded mixed ahead of closely watched Trump-Xi summit on trade, tariffs and technology restrictions.

zh.title: 特朗普抵达北京与习近平进行高风险会谈，亚太股市涨跌互现
zh.summary: 随着特朗普抵达北京与习近平就贸易、关税和技术限制进行谈判，亚太市场涨跌互现。

title: Cisco to cut jobs so it can invest more in AI, and the stock rockets toward a record
summary: Cisco announced job cuts to fund AI expansion, driving the stock to record levels as investors respond to the company's strong earnings and AI-focused strategy.
content: Cisco’s stock soars into record territory, after the networking giant announced plans to invest more in AI and upbeat earnings report.

zh.title: 思科裁员以增加人工智能投资，股价飙升至历史新高
zh.summary: 思科宣布裁员以资助人工智能扩张，投资者对公司强劲的财务业绩和专注人工智能的战略做出积极回应，推动股价升至历史新高。
